# Measurement Proof

## Goal

Make results interpretable.

## Minimum measurement

```text
UTMs
platform metrics
landing events
conversion events
activation events
paid events
cost
revenue
quality notes
```

## Causal measurement options

- platform lift study,
- holdout,
- geo lift,
- A/B test,
- CausalImpact/BSTS,
- MMM.

## Rule

If the decision is scale, use stronger evidence than CTR.
